_comment: Game difficulty parameters consumed by Core/GameEngine. Adjust freely without rebuild — file is loaded at runtime from Assets.

_field_doc.nailong_laugh_*_ms: Inclusive range from which the per-round hidden deadline is sampled uniformly. When deadline elapses without the user laughing, Nailong laughs first and the user wins.
_field_doc.calibration_ms: Time spent recording neutral-face baseline before countdown.
_field_doc.smile_threshold: Final score threshold AFTER neutral-baseline subtraction. Tune per detector.
_field_doc.consecutive_frames_to_confirm: Number of recent frames that must all exceed threshold for is_smiling=true.
_field_doc.lost_face_grace_ms: Below this, lost face is ignored. Above, game pauses and shows '奶龙看不见你了'.
_field_doc.lost_face_invalid_ms: Above this, round ends as INVALID.
